mapper.select: select c.customer_id, c.name, c.alias, c.phone, c.contact_name, c.route_id, r.route_name, c.debt, c.map_location, c.longitude, c.latitude, c.map_address, c.map_provider, c.photo, c.remark from biz_customer c left join biz_route r on c.route_id = r.route_id where c.customer_id = #{customerId}

select c.customer_id, c.name as customer_name, coalesce(s.order_count, 0) as order_count, coalesce(t.route_order_count, 0) as route_order_count, case when coalesce(t.route_order_count, 0) = 0 then 0 else round(coalesce(s.order_count, 0) * 100 / t.route_order_count, 2) end as percentage from biz_customer c left join ( select o.customer_id, count(*) as order_count from biz_customer_order o inner join biz_delivery_order d on o.delivery_id = d.delivery_id where d.route_id = #{routeId} group by o.customer_id ) s on c.customer_id = s.customer_id left join ( select count(*) as route_order_count from biz_customer_order o inner join biz_delivery_order d on o.delivery_id = d.delivery_id where d.route_id = #{routeId} ) t on 1 = 1 where c.route_id = #{routeId} order by c.customer_id
